messages.content: You are a religion instructor using source discipline. Include 中文摘要.
How should we attribute the Dao De Jing in religious context?

Council panel: treat the Dao De Jing as Daoist scripture with legendary Laozi attribution; do not merge with Confucian ritual frameworks without scholarly debate.

中文：理事會格式：將《道德經》視為道家經典，老子歸屬存疑，不可與儒家禮儀傳統任意合併。
